sourceRef.citation: Kourovka Notebook, Problem 15.38 (Khukhro & Mazurov eds., ed.15)

statement.latex: Does there exist a non-local hereditary composition formation${F}$of finite groups such that the set of all${F}$-sub\-nor\-mal subgroups is a sublattice of the subgroup lattice in any finite group? No, it does not (S.\,F.\,Kamornikov, Dokl. Math., { 81}, no.\,1 (2010), 97--100). %, 430, ? 5 (2010), 592--595

reiAssessment.solveRationale: Group theory IV_PROBLEM_UNDEFINED; Rei not specialized in group theory (yet)
reiAssessment.formalizationNotes: Kourovka problems are typically research-level group theory
